#### Solutions Spring 2026

- [Chapter 1](solutions/Chapter01-Solutions.pdf)
- [Chapter 2](solutions/Chapter02-Solutions.pdf)
- [Chapter 3](solutions/Chapter03-Solutions.pdf)
- [Chapter 5](solutions/Chapter05-Solutions.pdf)
- [Chapter 4](solutions/Chapter04-Solutions.pdf)
- [Chapter 6](solutions/Chapter06-Solutions.pdf)
- [Chapter 12](solutions/Chapter12-Solutions.pdf)
- [Chapter 14](solutions/Chapter14-Solutions.pdf)
- [Chapter 15](solutions/Chapter15-Solutions.pdf)
- [Chapter 19](solutions/Chapter19-Solutions.pdf)
